rulings.Case Title: BISHOP DONALD PIPKINS, AN INDIVIDUAL et al VS. HOMEQ CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, Sept. 12, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT OCWEN LOAN SERVICING,LLC'S Motion To Dismiss Second Amended Complaint. Grant dismiss with prejudice for reason set forth in moving party pleadings. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, Sept. 12, 2012. Line 7 - Defendant Terrence Isobe'S Demurrer To Complaint. Overrule 10 days to answer - concealment sufficiently plead to state cause of action. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PETE TRACHY VS. TROY KING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Compel Discovery And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, Sept. 12, 2012. Line 4 - DEFENDANT TROY KING and TROY, JR BOYLAND'S Motion To Compel further Discovery And For Sanctions. Grant motion plaintiff to produce all responsive documents, plus $4,600.00 in sanctions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY SKINNER DBA SALA & SALA INC. VS. EDWARD DEGUZMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, Sept. 12, 2012. Line 5 - DEFENDANT EDWARD DEGUZMAN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend notice fail to provide necessary information re payment in person which is on form. = (501/REQ)
